name: Shrimp Diane
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt half a cup of butter in a large skillet over high heat.
2. When the butter is nearly melted, add green onion, salt, garlic, ground peppers, basil, thyme, and oregano; stir well to combine.
3. Add shrimp and sauté until they turn pink, about 1 minute, shaking the pan rather than stirring.
4. Incorporate mushrooms and stock; continue adding the remaining half cup of butter in pieces, while constantly shaking the skillet, cooking until the butter sauce is creamy and smooth.
5. Garnish with parsley and serve immediately with French bread, or over pasta or rice.
Note: This recipe is a version of the Shrimp Diane served at Orleans Restaurant of Los Angeles.
